justification: The issue reports a bug in pandas Series.combine_first method when names are of type Timestamp. The error is caused by the method trying to sort the names which is deprecated and will be removed in future versions.
current_state_summary: The issue has been closed, but it's still important to understand the root cause of the bug and how to fix it.
